title: 3D Text Walk-Out ("Can’t Stop Me")
result_description: You walk out of the reel's frame and collide with giant 3D text — bumping your head on it and falling over a chair, while standing in front of the letters.

inputs.name: action_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Set up the phone with a chair/low table in front. Walk in, duck, bump your head, and fall over the chair.

edit_steps.note: overlay it, pull to the beginning — this cutout is the 'in front of text' layer

params.align: bottom edge to the back of the chair

edit_steps.note: lets the fall drop below the frame line

timing.cue: line up with the head bump

edit_steps.note: add at the start, write the sentence
on the second part, space the 'EX' out between the T's
duplicate, retype only EX, nudge up

params.note: drag the cutout overlay to the front

edit_steps.note: so you appear in front of the text

result.description: Subject collides with and stands in front of 3D text, then falls out of frame.
success_criteria: Cutout subject reads as in front of the letters
Rectangle mask hides the fall below the frame edge cleanly
Text 'bump' lands exactly on the head contact

narration_transcript: Set up your phone and have a chair or a little table in the front. Film yourself walking in, ducking, bumping your head and falling over the chair. Next open this clip in the CapCut app, duplicate it, hit remove background auto removal, overlay that clip and pull it to the beginning. Then select the original clip, hit mask, rectangle and line the bottom up with the back of the chair. The fall now looks like this. For the text, add text in the beginning, write out your sentence and line it up with the head bump. I also want to bump up that EX here. Select the head bump moment, hit split, select that second part and space out the EX between the T's. It should now look like this. Then duplicate that second text clip, only type EX, place it slightly above the T's and it looks like this. Finally, you want to appear in front of the text, so hit layers and drag the overlay to the left. Then export your video and that's it.

source_meta.caption: Here is a tutorial on how you can do this creative 3D “text can’t stop me” video edit walking out of the frame of your reels like seanyo9229 🎥😅 have fun creating!!
